concerns.text: Kickback concern: Original idea lists 'usage frequency' as an adherence outcome, but US-2 only computes completion_rate, avg_inter_session_days, total_minutes, and self_reported_engagement. No FR or SC exists for a usage-frequency metric (e.g., sessions per week or session count). Add FR-013 and corresponding SC to anchor this requirement.

US-5 (Comprehensive Logging) has FR-008 anchoring it, but no Success Criteria. Add SC-005 to measure logging completeness (e.g., 'All pipeline steps produce timestamped log entries with ≥95% coverage').

FR-007 (computational limits) references Edge Cases but lacks explicit user-story anchoring. Add '(see Edge Cases)' or anchor to a story that requires resource constraints (e.g., US-3 regression analysis).
FR-012 (dataset acquisition) references Edge Cases but lacks explicit user-story anchoring. Add '(see Edge Cases)' or anchor to US-1/US-2 which require data ingestion.
